title: My Resume
summary: Senior Engineering Leader and Architect with {yearsOfExperience}+ years of experience transforming complex business requirements into high-performance software. A former VP of Engineering and Co-Founder expert in scaling products from MVP to global launch. Proven track record in orchestrating multi-chain blockchain systems and integrating AI to drive user engagement. AWS certified with a focus on building secure, high-availability architectures.

experience.title: VP of Engineering
points: Directed the engineering organization through the full lifecycle of 'Chibi Kingdom,' scaling from prototype to a global multi-chain blockchain launch.
Spearheaded AI integration to boost user engagement, including intelligent chatbots for Web/Discord support and AI-driven generation of dynamic gaming content.
Architected a robust hybrid infrastructure integrating Unity gameplay with Web3 layers, managing high-integrity smart contracts across Ethereum, Polygon, and Base.
Established engineering standards and mentored a cross-functional team, ensuring 99.9% uptime for the game's token economy and NFT systems.

experience.title: Co-Founder & CTO
points: Co-founded a software agency and led a lean engineering squad to deliver high-performance web and mobile solutions for a portfolio of Vietnam-based startups and SMEs.
Acted as the lead solution architect, selecting scalable stacks (React, Node.js, Cloud) to accelerate time-to-market while maintaining high code quality.
Drove end-to-end product strategy—from stakeholder consulting and requirement gathering to overseeing execution and successful production releases.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Contract)
points: Developed the MVP for an Office Online Server integration, enabling real-time browser-based document editing within a banking-grade DMS.
Integrated DocuSign API to automate digital signature workflows, replacing manual processes with secure, legally-binding electronic approvals.
Delivered incremental feature updates and performance optimizations for core .NET/SQL Server components to meet evolving corporate security standards.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
points: Implemented and customized Microsoft Dynamics 365 for enterprise customers, including public services web portals.
Designed solution architectures and established CI/CD pipelines to accelerate delivery cycles.
Built integrations and custom modules using .NET, SQL Server, and jQuery.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead
points: Led the migration of HP Enterprise’s quoting engine from legacy Excel VBA to a modern .NET-based Sales Support Cloud (SSC) solution.
Engineered a high-performance architecture that reduced quote generation time from hours to minutes, significantly increasing sales team productivity.
Eliminated critical operational bottlenecks by lifting the performance constraints of Microsoft Office, enabling seamless 24/7 global availability for concurrent users.

experience.title: SQL Server Developer
points: Successfully executed the migration of a large-scale SQL Server database (2005 to 2012) while preserving complex business logic and zero data loss.
Developed automated migration and validation tools using SSIS, WPF, and Excel VBA, significantly reducing manual effort and project risk.

experience.title: Software Developer / Technical Lead
points: Built comprehensive web-based ERP modules for managing operations in luxury hotels, golf clubs, and resorts.
Engineered a groupware collaboration platform to improve efficiency for distributed remote teams across multiple properties.
Delivered enterprise stability using a diverse stack of .NET MVC, Java Spring, and Oracle.

skills.name: Full-Stack Development & Data
skills.items: Node.js, TypeScript, React, Next.js, .NET/C#, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, Oracle
